data.revised_prompt: A serene landscape featuring a tranquil, crystal-clear lake nestled among lush, rolling hills. In the background, majestic mountains with snow-capped peaks rise towards a breathtaking sunset sky, painted in hues of orange, pink, and purple. The water reflects the vibrant colors of the sky, creating a mirror-like effect. A few evergreen trees are scattered along the shoreline, and a small wooden dock extends into the lake. The entire scene evokes a sense of peace and natural beauty.
A peaceful natural scene showing a pristine lake surrounded by verdant hills under a colorful sunset sky with mountain backdrop.
